title: Add Status Field to Metrics with Lifecycle Stages
story: As a DataTools Pro user managing metrics, I want to assign a lifecycle status (Scoping, Review, Production, Retired) to each metric, so that I can track and filter metrics by their maturity stage.
description:
Add a status field to the metrics data model with predefined lifecycle stages: Scoping, Review, Production, Retired.

### UX
- Status dropdown in the metrics DataTable for inline editing
- Status filter to show/hide metrics by lifecycle stage
acceptance_criteria: Each metric has a status field with options: Scoping, Review, Production, Retired
Status is editable via dropdown in the metrics DataTable
Metrics can be filtered by status
ux_changes: Status dropdown column in metrics DataTable. Status filter for the metrics list.
middleware_changes: Updated metrics CRUD to handle the new status field.
data_model_changes: New `status` column on the metrics table with enum values: Scoping, Review, Production, Retired.
comment_summary: Developer added the status field to the metrics model, added an inline dropdown to the DataTable, and implemented a status filter. Ready for review on dev.
